headline: American Tower seen as top U.S. tower pick as analysts turn more bullish
summary: Investing.com -- American Tower is emerging as the preferred investment among U.S. wireless tower operators, with two Wall Street firms highlighting its stronger organic growth outlook, attractive valuation, and long-term exposure to data centers and AI-driven infrastructure.

headline: Goldman Sachs Assumes American Tower at Buy, Announces Price Target of $215
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Michael Ng   assumes American Tower (NYSE:AMT) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $215.

headline: RBC Capital Upgrades American Tower to Outperform, Raises Price Target to $205
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Jonathan Atkin   upgrades American Tower (NYSE:AMT) from Sector Perform to Outperform and raises the price target from $195 to $205.
